How to Use the Pest Control App

1. Login and main dashboard

• Login: Sign in with your email and password. Your role (technician, admin, or super admin) and permissions are loaded from your profile (e.g. canSearch, canSeeContracts, canViewAllContracts).

• Main menu: After login you see the main dashboard with buttons for Work View, Jobs, Contracts, Create Report, View Reports, Leads (if enabled), Notifications, and Search (if your account has search enabled). Use Help (this screen) anytime.

2. Reports and quotations

• Create Report: From the main menu open Create Report. You can open Company Report (service report), Contract Quotation (including Custom Quote), Bird Quotation, Generic Quotation, Action Form, Service Agreements, ERA, or Create Custom Report (with your saved template). Each opens the same way; fill the form and save to generate a PDF.

• View Reports: Open View Reports to see saved or uploaded PDFs. Upload PDFs to Firebase Storage using the folder path ReportsYY/Month (e.g. Reports26/January).

3. Contracts\n\nContracts hold customer and visit information. Add and service customer contracts. Mark visits done when you complete a visit so Last Visit and Next Visit stay correct. From a contract you can create reports (fields auto-fill), view past reports by year folder, and add the contract to your Work View schedule.

4. Work View and Jobs

- Use Work View to schedule your day and mark work complete.
- Use Jobs to manage assigned work items.

Custom times and drag-and-drop
- Create with custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → when the time dialog appears choose “Custom time…”, enter start (e.g. 08:30) and end (e.g. 15:00).
- Change event time: Tap event → Edit Time → set start/end and save.
- Move event: In daily view, long-press an event, drag to another time slot and release; start moves to that slot, duration is kept.

5. Commission (Leads)\n\nUse Leads to add and track leads and commission where this is enabled for your account. Add a lead, assign a technician or added-by, and track invoices and commission as allowed by your role.

6. Notifications\n\nNotifications are in-app only. Open Notifications from the main menu to see assignments and updates. Each user sees only their own. You can delete individual notifications or clear all.

7. Support and saving\n\nWhen you save a report, the PDF is stored on the device and you can upload it to Storage. When you save a job or add a Work View event, data is saved to the cloud. If something looks wrong, try logging out and back in. Contact your support contact for help.

How to Use the Pest Control App

1. Login and main dashboard (Admin / Super Admin)

• Login and roles: Sign in with email and password. Your role (admin or super_admin) and permissions are loaded from your profile. Admins can see contracts, assign work, and use the Admin Dashboard; super admins also have Employee Management, Location Finder, and Messaging.

• Main menu: Work View, Jobs, Contracts, Create Report, View Reports, Leads, Notifications, Search (if enabled), Admin Dashboard, and (super admin only) Employee Management. Use Help anytime.

2. Reports and quotations (Admin)

• Create Report: Same flow as technicians — Company Report, Contract Quotation (incl. Custom Quote), Action Form, Create Custom Report, etc. Create reports from Contracts/Jobs or from the main menu.

• Upload PDFs to Firebase Storage: ReportsYY/Month/<PDF>. Use View Reports to share with customers/office.

3. Contracts (Admin)\n\nAdd contracts from the main menu. Use the Assign-to dropdown to assign a technician; the assigned technician receives an in-app notification. You can view, edit, and delete contracts where your role permits. From a contract you can create reports, view past reports by year folder, and add the contract to a technician’s Work View schedule.

4. Work View and Jobs (Admin)

Work View: Schedule events and mark complete.
- Reminders are scheduled ~30 minutes before jobs/contracts.
- Custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → “Custom time…” → enter start and end (e.g. 08:30 and 15:00).
- Edit time: Tap event → Edit Time → change start/end and save.
- Move event: Long-press in daily view, drag to another slot, release; duration is kept.

Jobs
- Create jobs and assign technician via dropdown.
- Admins may have additional delete/edit capabilities depending on role flags.

5. Commission (Leads) (Admin)\n\nUse Leads for oversight. Add and track leads; assign technicians or added-by. Updating materials or commission can notify the assigned technician. Use this to keep commission and invoices in order across the team.

6. Notifications (Admin)\n\nNotifications are in-app only. Open Notifications to see assignments and updates. Each user sees only their own. Use them to audit what was assigned and when. You can delete individual notifications or clear all from your own list.

7. Support (Admin)\n\nWhen staff report missing items, confirm assignment and owner are correct. For report issues, confirm the correct Storage year folder was used and upload completed. When you save a report, job, or Work View event, data is saved to the cloud. Contact your support path for further help.

How to Use the Pest Control App

1. Login and main dashboard (Technician)

• Login: Sign in with your email and password. Your role and permissions (e.g. canSearch, canSeeContracts) are loaded from your profile.

• Main menu: Work View, Jobs, Contracts, Create Report, View Reports, Leads (if enabled), Notifications. If your account has search enabled, the Search button appears — use it to find contracts, reports, commission, and work view items. Use Help (this screen) anytime.

2. Reports and quotations (Technician)

• Create Report: From the main menu open Create Report. You can open Company Report (service report), Contract Quotation (including Custom Quote), Action Form, or Create Custom Report. Each works the same: fill the form and save to generate a PDF. Create reports from Jobs or Contracts so fields auto-fill.

• Upload: Use folder path ReportsYY/Month (e.g. Reports26/January). Use View Reports to open and share saved or uploaded PDFs.

3. Contracts\n\nContracts hold customer and visit information. Add and service customer contracts. Mark visits done when you complete a visit so Last Visit and Next Visit stay correct. From a contract you can create reports (fields auto-fill), view past reports by year folder, and add the contract to your Work View schedule.

4. Jobs & Work View

Work View + Jobs (Technician)

Work View
- Check your daily schedule and upcoming events.
- Mark events complete when finished.
- Custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → when the time dialog appears choose “Custom time…”, enter start (e.g. 08:30) and end (e.g. 15:00).
- Change event time: Tap event → Edit Time → set start/end and save.
- Move event: In daily view, long-press an event, drag to another time slot and release; start moves to that slot, duration is kept.

5. Commission

Commission (Leads) (Technician)

- Use Leads to track invoices/commission where enabled.
6. Notifications\n\nNotifications are in-app only. Open Notifications from the main menu to see assignments and updates. You see only your own. You can delete individual notifications or clear all.

7. Support and saving\n\nWhen you save a report, the PDF is stored on the device and you can upload it to Storage. When you save a job or add a Work View event, data is saved to the cloud. If something needs correcting in jobs or contracts, contact support. If reports are missing, confirm you uploaded to the correct year folder (ReportsYY/Month).

How to Use the Pest Control App

1. Getting started

After login you see the main menu. Your main tools are Work View, Jobs, Contracts, and Reports. Use Notifications to see assigned work and updates. Use Help (this screen) anytime. Search is available if your account has search enabled.

2. Reports\n\nCreate reports from the main menu, from Jobs, or from Contracts. Report types include Company Report, Generic Report, and Action Form. When you save a report, a PDF is created on the device. Upload PDFs to Firebase Storage before removing local copies. Use the folder path ReportsYY/Month (e.g. Reports26/January). Use View Reports to open and share saved or uploaded PDFs.

Contracts

- Add and service customer contracts.
- Mark visits done to keep Last/Next Visit correct.

4. Work View and Jobs

- Use Work View to schedule your day and mark work complete.
- Use Jobs to manage assigned work items.

Custom times and drag-and-drop
- Create with custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → when the time dialog appears choose “Custom time…”, enter start (e.g. 08:30) and end (e.g. 15:00).
- Change event time: Tap event → Edit Time → set start/end and save.
- Move event: In daily view, long-press an event, drag to another time slot and release; start moves to that slot, duration is kept.

5. Commission (Leads)\n\nUse Leads to add and track leads and commission where this is enabled for your account. Add a lead, assign a technician or added-by, and track invoices and commission as allowed by your role.

6. Notifications\n\nNotifications are in-app only. Open Notifications from the main menu to see assignments and updates. Each user sees only their own. You can delete individual notifications or clear all.

7. Support and saving\n\nWhen you save a report, the PDF is stored on the device and you can upload it to Storage. When you save a job or add a Work View event, data is saved to the cloud. If something looks wrong, try logging out and back in. Contact your support contact for help.

AI Chat uses keys stored in Firestore (collection AI-Chat, document AI-API). Only a super admin can update them.

• KEY = Hugging Face token. Get it at: https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens (create a token with Inference permissions). Used with Hugging Face Router.

• key-grog = Groq API key. Get it at: https://console.groq.com (sign in, go to API Keys, create a key). Used with Groq.

The app uses Groq if key-grog is set; otherwise it uses Hugging Face if KEY is set. Set at least one.

To update in the app:
1. Open AI Chat
2. Tap the settings (gear) icon top-right
3. Choose "Update Hugging Face Key" or "Update Groq Key"
4. Enter the new key and tap Update

The keys are stored in Firestore only; the app never displays them.
